profile.yml:
# profile.yml — generated by the hosted onboarding chat.
# application_defaults is intentionally blank: the aggregator never fills
# forms, so the interview never asks for work authorization / visa /
# start date / relocation-for-forms / AI-policy-ack. Hand-edit any field;
# code never overwrites this file after this initial write — EXCEPT
# web/lib/profile/regenerateCv.ts (ONB-A decision #3), which may rewrite
# background_summary alone if a user uploads a resume after skipping it
# during onboarding. Every other field, and every other file, is still a
# one-time write.

identity:
  name: Alex Quinn
  email: alex.quinn@example.com
  phone: +1-555-0142
  location_base: Denver, CO
  linkedin: linkedin.com/in/alexquinn-example
background_summary: Backend and platform engineer with ~8 years building and operating high-throughput services.
location_and_compensation:
  base: Denver, CO
  remote_acceptable: true
  in_person_acceptable: hybrid acceptable in/near Denver; remote preferred
  relocation: open to relocation for an exceptional role + comp package
  current_comp_usd: 165000
  target_comp_usd: 175000-205000
what_he_is_looking_for:
  tier_1:
    label: Platform / infrastructure / distributed-systems engineering
    notes: Owning developer-facing platforms, infra, or core services at scale.
    reference_role: Staff Platform Engineer at a mid-size product company
  tier_2:
    label: ML / data-platform engineering (the systems around models, not the models)
    notes: Feature stores, training/serving infra, data pipelines.
key_technical_skills:
  - Go
  - Python
  - TypeScript
  - PostgreSQL
  - Kafka
  - Kubernetes
application_defaults:
  work_authorization: ''
  visa_sponsorship_needed: false
  earliest_start_date: ''
  relocation_willingness: ''
  in_person_willingness: ''
  ai_policy_ack: ''
  previous_interview_with_company: {}
thesis.md:
# Hunting thesis

Backend/platform engineer seeking infra-ownership roles at product companies with real scale and a healthy engineering culture; open to ML-platform roles as a strong second lane.

## Tiers

- **Platform / infrastructure / distributed-systems engineering** — Owning developer-facing platforms, infra, or core services at scale.
- **ML / data-platform engineering (the systems around models, not the models)** — Feature stores, training/serving infra, data pipelines.

## Hard constraints

- Crypto / Web3 / trading products
- Below-market compensation (a pay cut from current total comp)
- Defense / weapons work

## Degree gate

No PhD required — open to any role that does not gate on an advanced degree.
cv.md:
# CV — assembled from onboarding interview (no resume provided)

## Senior Backend Engineer — Acme Corp (6 years)

- Cut p99 latency from 4s to 300ms on a payments service running at 20k events/sec.

## Skills

Go, Python, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Kafka, Kubernetes
disqualifiers.yml:
hard_disqualifiers:
  - Crypto / Web3 / trading products
  - Below-market compensation (a pay cut from current total comp)
  - Defense / weapons work
soft_concerns:
  - Very early-stage startups with no senior engineers to learn from
  - Fully in-office with no remote flexibility
